name: aioption-judge
docker_compose_file:
version: '3.8'
services:
  judge:
    build: .
    image: aioption-judge:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      - OPENROUTER_API_KEY
      - ETH_PRIVATE_KEY
      - RPC_URL=${RPC_URL:-https://ethereum-sepolia.publicnode.com}
      - BET_CONTRACT_ADDRESS
      - OPENROUTER_MODEL=${OPENROUTER_MODEL:-anthropic/claude-opus-4-6}
      - POLL_INTERVAL=${POLL_INTERVAL:-15}
    logging:
      driver: json-file
      options:
        max-size: "10m"
        max-file: "3"
